purpose: Classify whether a workflow or command block must stop Bannerlord before running.
forceStopPolicy: Use force only when explicitly requested or after a soft stop is proven insufficient.

git-inspect.reason: Git inspection does not mutate runtime state or claim live proof.

source-patch-only.reason: Source edits alone do not assume Bannerlord is stopped.

static-validation.reason: Static verifiers do not touch Bannerlord runtime.

build.reason: Build workflows normally precede install/live proof and should not assume a running game has current code.

install.reason: Install/copy operations can replace files consumed by Bannerlord.

launch.reason: Launch automation should start from a known clean process state unless the workflow owns stop internally.

live-cert.reason: Live certs claim Bannerlord runtime behavior and require a known starting state.

full-workflow.reason: Full workflows that build/install/launch/validate runtime must own or perform a stop phase.

route-visible-start.reason: Route visible start validates live map and travel behavior.
